---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.page-header}
# About Me
:::

::: {.section-container}

::: {.about-full-grid}

::: {.about-full-photo}
![Wendy Frankel](photo.jpg){.profile-photo-large}
:::

::: {.about-full-text}

## Hello

Thank you for stopping by my website!

### What I Do

Throughout my education and professional experience in ecology, I developed a deep awareness of the scale and urgency of global biodiversity loss, alongside knowledge of the practical challenges of quantifying and interpreting it. That gap between the problem and the data drove me to pursue a Master's of Data Science at UBC after my degree in Biology.

I'm passionate about continuing to apply Data Science workflows to Biological Data, assisting in the greater goal of understanding Biodiversity loss.

### Education

**Master of Data Science** · University of British Columbia · In Progress

**Bachelor of Science in Biology, Honours Specialization Ecology and Environmental Biology** · University of British Columbia · 2020–2024

---

::: {.about-cta}
[Download My Full CV](resume.pdf){.btn-primary-custom download="Wendy_Frankel_CV.pdf"}
[Get In Touch](mailto:wendygfrankel811@gmail.com){.btn-secondary-custom}
:::

:::

:::

:::
